ceremony.label: Ceremony at 09:00
ceremony.description: Automatically activates memorial events every day at 9 AM.

autostart.label: Autostart on system boot
autostart.description: Allows the program to start automatically with the system.

grace.label: Grace window
grace.description: Time after 09:00 during which the ceremony can still start.

weekdays.label: Weekdays only
weekdays.description: Disables automatic activation on Saturdays and Sundays.

use_system_theme.label: Use system theme
use_system_theme.description: Follow the operating system theme (light/dark) instead of the app setting.

system_time.label: System time
system_time.description: Use local clock instead of accurate NTP time.

skip_tomorrow.label: Skip tomorrow
skip_tomorrow.description: Cancels only the next scheduled ceremony (one-time).

audio_mode.label: Companion mode
audio_mode.description: Select audio accompaniment: voice, metronome, bell, or anthem.

voice.label: Announcement voice
voice.description: Select voice for the pre-ceremony announcement. Some voices have only the announcement without the ending.

volume.label: Volume
volume.description: Volume level for the application's audio presets.

volume_priority.label: Volume priority
volume_priority.description: Forces the selected level during the ceremony.

auto_unmute.label: Auto-unmute
auto_unmute.description: Automatically enables sound if it was muted in the system.

pause.label: Pause other players
pause.description: Pauses music and video (Spotify, YouTube) during the ceremony.

resume.label: Resume playback
resume.description: Automatically resume paused players after the ceremony.

overlay.label: Visual overlay
overlay.description: Show full-screen memorial overlay during the ceremony.

flag_animation.label: Anthem flag animation
flag_animation.description: Show the flag animation during the anthem segment when the visual overlay is enabled.

about.description: The application was created to honor the memory of fallen defenders and victims of war.
about.acknowledgments: Desktop version inspired by Bohdan Hdal's app.
about.glory: Every day at 09:00 we remember everyone whose lives were taken by the war. Glory to the Heroes.

0.9.5.skip_date_persistence: The "Skip Tomorrow" state is now saved to settings, surviving application restarts.
0.9.5.skip_date_auto_clear: The skip status is automatically cleared after the skipped ceremony time passes.
0.9.5.desktop_entry_localization: Added localized name and comment to the Linux `.desktop` application entry.
0.9.5.linux_navdrawer_ghosting: Fixed a visual glitch on Linux where navigation menu indicators would incorrectly remain highlighted.
0.9.5.linux_desktop_launch: Fixed application launch from the Linux application menu and corrected window grouping (`StartupWMClass`).
0.9.5.snap_autostart_cleanup: Cleaned up deprecated autostart flags and simplified `.desktop` files for better Snap compatibility.

0.9.4.radio_bg_voice: New announcement voice: "Grinchenko University Radio" (Radio BG) — audio recording from Grinchenko University Radio.

0.9.3.copy_logs_about_button: About tab: added a Copy debug logs button that packages the latest application log tail with debug metadata and copies it to the clipboard for easier troubleshooting.
0.9.3.copy_logs_backend_command: Backend `get_log_contents` command now returns the newest application log file tail together with app/version/platform metadata, so support requests can be made without manual log hunting.
0.9.3.copy_logs_feedback: Copy logs flow shows clipboard success/failure feedback directly in the About tab, making the diagnostic action clearer for users.

0.9.2.changelog_yaml_structure: Changelog moved from raw Markdown to structured YAML (`CHANGELOG.yaml`) as a single source of truth for version history.
0.9.2.changelog_translations: Changelog entries localized via i18next namespace `changelog.[version].[key]`, enabling full translations for all changelog entries across all versions.
0.9.2.changelog_tab_refactor: ChangelogTab refactored to consume structured YAML data and i18next translations instead of parsing Markdown, improving maintainability and enabling easy localization.

0.9.1.theme_preference_settings: UI theme preference: new `useSystemTheme` (follow system) and `uiTheme` (`light` | `dark`) settings exposed to the frontend and persisted by the backend. A new control in the Settings tab allows choosing to follow the system theme or select Light/Dark manually.
0.9.1.theme_preference_frontend: Frontend support for `useSystemTheme`/`uiTheme` in `types.ts`, `App.tsx`, and `SettingsTab.tsx` so the UI respects the persisted preference and system changes.
0.9.1.memoize_fluent_theme: Memoize Fluent theme creation in the frontend to avoid recreating theme objects on every render and reduce unnecessary reflows.
0.9.1.i18n_theme_strings: i18n: added strings for the new theme controls in `en.json` and `uk.json`.

0.9.0.changelog_tab: `ChangelogTab` with infinite scroll — changelog is parsed from `CHANGELOG.md` at build time via Vite `?raw` import, no network requests required.
0.9.0.settings_section_headings: Section headings in `SettingsTab` via new `sections.*` i18n keys.
0.9.0.fluent_ui_migration: **Frontend fully migrated from FAST/web-components to Fluent UI React v9** (`@fluentui/react-components`, `@fluentui/react-icons`, `react`, `react-dom`, `react-markdown`, `@vitejs/plugin-react` added).
0.9.0.ui_component_split: UI split into dedicated React component files: `App.tsx`, `SettingsTab.tsx`, `AboutTab.tsx`, `Overlay.tsx`, `ChangelogTab.tsx` (lazy-loaded).
0.9.0.nav_drawer: Navigation replaced with Fluent `NavDrawer` + `NavItem` with icons.
0.9.0.window_size: Main window size increased from 360×460 to 640×520 (min 500×400).
0.9.0.autostart_nonblocking: Autostart sync on startup made non-blocking via `tauri::async_runtime::spawn_blocking`.
0.9.0.flatpak_locale: Flatpak `.desktop` and `metainfo.xml`: English set as default locale, Ukrainian as `[uk]` variant — aligns with AppStream/Flathub conventions.
0.9.0.flatpak_ci: Flatpak CI: added `ppa:flatpak/stable` to fix lib64 build failures on GitHub Actions.
0.9.0.msix_manifest: MSIX `appxmanifest.xml`: `uap10:Parameters="--hidden"` added to `startupTask`; `DisplayName` attribute removed from `StartupTask`.
0.9.0.sync_autostart_blocking: `sync_autostart_from_system` no longer blocks the Tauri `setup` hook, preventing a potential startup hang.

0.8.5.anthem_audio_performers: Anthem audio performances by Mykhailo Khoma and Oleksandr Ponomarov.
0.8.5.anthem_voice_param: `AnthemVoice` parameter in `play_preset` / `AudioEngine` to select the correct anthem file at playback time.
0.8.5.anthem_voice_dropdown: Anthem voice selection dropdown in the settings UI; hidden automatically when the active preset has no anthem segment.
0.8.5.anthem_voice_i18n: i18n strings for anthem voice control (`controls.anthem_voice.*`) in `en.json` and `uk.json`.
0.8.5.sync_autostart_command: `sync_autostart` Tauri command for explicit autostart synchronisation on demand.
0.8.5.autostart_sync_startup: Autostart state is now synchronised with the actual system state at application startup (`lib.rs`) instead of being applied blindly from the persisted value.
0.8.5.get_settings_sync: `get_settings` command syncs the persisted autostart flag against the real platform state before returning, keeping the UI consistent with external changes (e.g. system Settings toggles).
0.8.5.flag_animation_listener_once: Flag animation window event listeners now use `once` instead of `listen`, preventing listener accumulation across repeated ceremonies.
0.8.5.flag_animation_window_close: Flag animation window was not closing after ceremony end: the global `on_window_event` handler intercepted `CloseRequested` on all windows and called `hide()` instead of closing. Handler is now scoped to the main window only.

0.8.4.flag_animation_window: Flag animation window (`flag-animation.html`) — a fullscreen animated Ukrainian flag rendered via canvas that appears during the anthem segment of the ceremony.
0.8.4.show_flag_animation_setting: New `showFlagAnimation` setting (default: `false`) to toggle the flag animation independently of the visual overlay.
0.8.4.has_anthem_helper: `AudioPreset::has_anthem()` helper to check whether a preset includes the anthem segment.
0.8.4.anthem_tauri_events: `anthem-start` / `anthem-end` Tauri events emitted by `AudioEngine` for precise flag window lifecycle control.
0.8.4.msix_startup_task: MSIX packaged `StartupTask` (`uap5` extension) in `appxmanifest.xml` for proper autostart support on packaged Windows builds.
0.8.4.msix_autostart_api: Windows autostart for MSIX now uses `ApplicationModel::StartupTask` API instead of a Startup-folder `.lnk` shortcut; `mslnk` dependency removed.
0.8.4.settings_serde_default: Settings struct now derives `#[serde(default)]` so missing fields in persisted JSON fall back gracefully.
0.8.4.overlay_flag_row: Visual overlay toggle now also controls the visibility of the flag animation row in the UI.
0.8.4.anthem_playback_timing: Anthem playback timing: metronome end is now detected by waiting for the player queue rather than a hardcoded 30-second sleep, ensuring the anthem starts precisely when the metronome finishes.

0.8.3.msix_startup_lnk: MSIX autostart now uses Startup-folder shortcut (`.lnk` file) instead of manifest extension, providing better compatibility and control.
0.8.3.msix_startup_invalid_ext: Removed invalid MSIX startup task extension from manifest that was using incorrect `desktop` namespace approach.

0.8.2.msix_desktop_namespace: MSIX startup task now uses correct `desktop` namespace instead of invalid `uap5` for FullTrust applications.

0.8.1.adaptive_tray_icon: Adaptive tray icon that automatically switches between light and dark versions to match the system theme.
0.8.1.realtime_theme_watch: Real-time theme watching for Windows (via registry) and Linux (via XDG Desktop Portal).
0.8.1.unified_theme_detection: Unified system theme detection supporting Windows, GNOME, and KDE Plasma.
0.8.1.gnome_tray_handling: Specialized handling for GNOME to ensure tray icon visibility on its dark top panel.
0.8.1.theme_aware_tray_assets: Replaced the static tray icon with theme-aware assets (`-light` and `-dark` versions).

0.8.0.flatpak_support: Flatpak support with autostart via `.desktop` file in `~/.config/autostart/`.
0.8.0.unified_autostart_detection: Unified autostart detection for Snap, Flatpak, and standard installations.
0.8.0.tray_icon_dedicated: Tray icon now uses dedicated `tray-icon-32.png` instead of default window icon.
0.8.0.msix_identifier: MSIX identifier changed to `ua.pp.khvylyna.MinuteOfSilence` for proper store submission.

0.7.8.resume_playback_setting: Optional "Resume playback" setting to restore paused media after the ceremony.
0.7.8.targeted_media_handling: Targeted media handling: the app now tracks which specific players were paused and only resumes them if they are still paused.
0.7.8.post_sleep_windows: Real-time post-sleep handling on Windows via `WM_POWERBROADCAST` hook to trigger immediate clock sync upon resume.
0.7.8.weekdays_only_logic: "Weekdays only" logic now correctly applied to both the ceremony trigger and notifications.
0.7.8.test_coverage_presets: Improved test coverage for `Silence` and `VoiceMetronomeEnding` presets in `settings_test.rs`.
0.7.8.cargo_toml_cleanup: Cleaned up redundant Win32 features in `Cargo.toml`.
0.7.8.deps_update_0_7_8: Updated dependencies: Tauri v2.11.0, Tokio v1.52.2, Vite v8.0.10.

0.7.7.overlay_i18n: Overlay text i18n support (title and subtitle localized).
0.7.7.msix_localization: Windows MSIX localization for app name in system language.
0.7.7.appxmanifest_ms_resource: Updated appxmanifest to use ms-resource:AppName for localized DisplayName.

0.7.5.platform_refactor: Platform code refactored: `platform_windows.rs` + `platform_linux.rs` → `platform/{linux,windows}/` directories. `commands.rs` + `tray.rs` moved to `app/` module. `CeremonyManager` moved to separate `core/ceremony.rs` file. `is_msix()` function moved to `platform/mod.rs`.

0.7.4.snap_interfaces_cleanup: Removed redundant Snap interfaces (`home`, `login-session-observe`, `upower-observe`, `hardware-observe`, `system-observe`) to streamline Store approval.

0.7.3.snap_autostart_robust: Robust manual Snap autostart management via `.desktop` file in `$SNAP_USER_DATA/.config/autostart`.
0.7.3.snap_plugs: `home` and `login-session-observe` plugs to `snapcraft.yaml` for better integration and autostart support.
0.7.3.snap_autostart_logic: Snap autostart logic to use official `snapd` mechanism for confined applications.
0.7.3.startup_wm_class: `StartupWMClass` in desktop file to match application binary name.
0.7.3.snap_autostart_module: Moved Snap autostart logic to a dedicated `platform_linux::autostart` module.

0.7.2.window_state_preservation: Window state preservation before ceremony and restoration after ceremony ends.
0.7.2.window_permissions_msix: Window permissions for minimize/hide operations in MSIX packages.

0.7.1.auto_show_window: Auto-show window when ceremony starts, even if minimized or hidden.
0.7.1.ceremony_end_flashing: Ceremony-end flashing when restarting ceremony multiple times via test button.
0.7.1.ceremony_status_update: Ceremony status now updates before command returns.
0.7.1.overlay_wording_uk: Fixed "повноекранний екран" → "оверлей вшанування на весь екран" in Ukrainian locale.
0.7.1.removed_scheduler_task: Removed unused Task Scheduler autostart functions from `platform_scheduler_task.rs`.

0.7.0.msix_toast_notifications: MSIX Toast Notifications support via WinRT API for Microsoft Store packages.
0.7.0.msix_notifications_appcontainer: Reminder notifications not working in MSIX packages due to AppContainer restrictions.

0.6.6.msix_startup_task_0_6_6: MSIX StartupTask extension for autostart in Microsoft Store packages.
0.6.6.voice_announcements_improved: Improved voice announcements from Sonia Sotnyk and Daria Khomutovskyi.
0.6.6.deps_bump_0_6_6: Bump i18next, typescript-eslint, tokio, and vitest dependencies.
0.6.6.ceremony_grace_trigger: Ceremony not triggering in grace window when started after 09:00.
0.6.6.audio_snap_sandbox: Audio file discovery in Snap sandbox.

0.6.5.bohdan_ending_voice: New ending voice from Bohdan Hdal with "Slava Ukrajini".
0.6.5.bohdan_ending_updated: Updated ending voice for Bohdan Hdal to use new "Slava Ukrajini" recording.

0.6.4.voice_selection: Voice selection for announcement with 4 options: Bohdan Hdal (original), Sonia Sotnyk (Vshanui), Dania Khomutovskyi (Vshanui), Air Alert app.
0.6.4.preset_with_ending: New audio presets with endings: "Voice + metronome + ending".
0.6.4.ending_voice_files: Ending voice files: "Vichna slava Herojam" and "Slava Ukrajini".
0.6.4.voice_duration_selected: Voice duration now uses selected voice instead of hardcoded announcement.
0.6.4.wait_voice_finish: Wait for voice announcement to finish before playing metronome.
0.6.4.skip_ending_air_alert: Skip ending for Air Alert voice in VoiceMetronomeEnding preset.
0.6.4.voice_durations_cached: Voice durations cached at startup to avoid repeated file reads.

0.6.3.precise_timing_voice: Precise timing for presets with voice announcement to ensure silence starts at exactly 09:00.
0.6.3.symphonia_duration: Audio duration detection now uses symphonia for accurate OGG metadata reading.
0.6.3.linux_audio_deps: Updated Linux audio dependencies: alsa 0.11 and cpal 0.17.3.
0.6.3.removed_dynamic_import: Removed unnecessary dynamic import of syncNtpNow in frontend.
0.6.3.unused_audio_files: Removed unused audio files from the package.

0.6.2.silent_preset: New audio preset that shows visual overlay and pauses other players without playing any sound.
0.6.2.preset_names_i18n: Preset names are now translatable via i18n system.

0.6.0.bohdan_credits: Added credits to Bohdan Hdal's original mobile app in README.md and About tab.
0.6.0.rust_deps_0_6_0: Updated Rust dependencies: rust-i18n 4.0 (up to 3x performance improvement), windows-future 0.3.2, tokio 1.52. MSRV updated to Rust 1.80.

0.5.3.audio_msix_paths: Audio playback in MSIX packages: switched to Tauri's native path resolver for cross-platform resource paths.
0.5.3.version_api_tauri: Frontend version display now uses Tauri's `getVersion()` API instead of duplicating version in `package.json`.

0.5.2.ms_store_identity: Microsoft Store identity and localized display name ("Хвилина мовчання") for official Store distribution.

0.5.1.full_i18n: Full localization (i18n) with Ukrainian and English support via `i18next` and `rust-i18n`.
0.5.1.snap_audio_pulseaudio: Snap audio handling: refactored to use native PulseAudio/PipeWire bridge for reliable playback.
0.5.1.unified_app_identifiers: Unified application identifiers and fixed icon paths for correct display in Linux menus and system trays.
0.5.1.windows_sdk_compat: Windows build compatibility with latest Windows SDK (windows-rs v0.62).
0.5.1.media_control_async: Media control reliability: asynchronous pausing prevents backend panics on Linux.
0.5.1.ui_badge_i18n: UI badge localization and dashboard status indicator updates.

0.5.0.reminder_notifications: System reminder notifications before the ceremony (configurable: immediately or up to 10 minutes before).
0.5.0.reminder_ui_controls: User interface controls for enabling and configuring reminder notifications.
0.5.0.windows_media_gsmtc: Improved Windows media pausing by migrating from legacy `WM_APPCOMMAND` to the modern `GlobalSystemMediaTransportControlsSessionManager` API for reliable playback control.
0.5.0.version_bump_0_5_0: Bumped project version to 0.5.0 across all configuration files.
0.5.0.window_restore_tray: Fixed window restoration from the system tray by explicitly unminimizing the window before showing it.

0.4.2.windows_media_appcommand: Windows media pause: switched from `SendInput(VK_MEDIA_PLAY_PAUSE)` to `WM_APPCOMMAND(APPCOMMAND_MEDIA_PAUSE)` for more reliable pausing.
0.4.2.media_no_resume: Media players no longer resume after the ceremony ends — they stay paused.
0.4.2.msix_packaging: MSIX packaging support via `winapp` CLI tool.
0.4.2.msix_assets: Application assets (icons, tiles) for Microsoft Store distribution.

0.4.1.snap_connection_refused: Resolved 'Connection refused' error on Snap autostart by using native Snap command wrapper.
0.4.1.snap_build_license: Fixed Snap build validation by switching to a Proprietary license in snapcraft.yaml.
0.4.1.snap_autostart_duplicate: Simplified autostart logic and resolved duplicate argument issues in Linux environments.
0.4.1.readme_screenshots: Rich README layout with application screenshots for better visual documentation.
0.4.1.version_bump_0_4_1: Bumped project version to 0.4.1 across all configuration files.
0.4.1.code_style_librs: Improved code style and formatting in src-tauri/src/lib.rs.

0.4.0.visual_overlay: Visual ceremony overlay with brutalist animations and styles for a more immersive experience.
0.4.0.show_visual_overlay_toggle: `show_visual_overlay` toggle in settings to enable or disable the ceremonial screen.
0.4.0.flatpak_support_0_4_0: Comprehensive Flatpak support with dedicated manifests for Flathub submission.
0.4.0.appstream_metadata: AppStream metadata and desktop entry for better integration with Linux software centers.
0.4.0.flatpak_gnome50: Upgraded Flatpak runtime to GNOME 50 for improved performance and modern libraries.
0.4.0.version_bump_0_4_0: Bumped project version to 0.4.0 across all configuration files.

0.3.1.snap_segfault: Resolved Critical Segmentation Fault in Snap package by removing duplicate runtime libraries.
0.3.1.libpxbackend_error: Fixed `libpxbackend` loading error by adding `glib-networking` to stage-packages.
0.3.1.snap_build_gnome_sdk: Corrected Snap build environment to properly link against GNOME SDK on Ubuntu 24.04 (core24).
0.3.1.desktop_entry_linux: Integrated `.desktop` entry for proper application visibility in Linux app menus.
0.3.1.gitignore_snap: Automatic exclusion of Snap build artifacts and logs in `.gitignore`.
0.3.1.snap_amd64_only: Refocused Snap support on `amd64` architecture for better stability and testing.
0.3.1.version_bump_0_3_1: Bumped project version to 0.3.1 across all configuration files.

0.3.0.settings_descriptions: Detailed descriptions and info blocks for all settings in the UI for better clarity.
0.3.0.auto_unmute: Auto-unmute feature with a dedicated toggle to restore system sound during the ceremony.
0.3.0.ceremony_enabled_toggle: Ceremony enabled toggle to allow temporary deactivation of the daily schedule.
0.3.0.grace_window_configurable: Configurable late-start grace window (0-5 minutes) for handling system wake-up after 09:00.
0.3.0.snapcraft_config: Snapcraft configuration for Ubuntu App Center with support for amd64 and arm64 architectures.
0.3.0.single_instance: Single application instance enforcement (automatically focuses the existing window on relaunch).
0.3.0.app_icon_snap: Integrated official application icon for Snap and Linux desktop environments.
0.3.0.ntp_stabilized: Stabilized NTP synchronization by using Google and Cloudflare servers as reliable fallbacks.
0.3.0.autostart_hidden_arg: Fixed autostart plugin configuration by removing the unhandled `--hidden` argument.
0.3.0.media_unmute_order: Improved media handling: ensured players are paused before unmuting on Windows.
0.3.0.tray_skip_sync: Fixed synchronization between the tray menu and the settings window for the "Skip Next" status.
0.3.0.audio_engine_rodio: Resolved audio engine stability issues by migrating to `rodio 0.22` with proper stream handling.
0.3.0.build_icon_fields: Fixed various build-time issues, including invalid icon fields in Tauri configuration.
0.3.0.vite8_eslint10: Migrated to Vite 8 and ESLint 10 (Flat Config) for improved development workflow.
0.3.0.ci_unified: Refactored the CI/CD pipeline into a unified `ci.yml` with comprehensive build and test stages.
0.3.0.style_css_moved: Moved UI styles to a dedicated `style.css` file for better maintainability.
0.3.0.deps_update_0_3_0: Updated project dependencies (thiserror, dirs, windows-rs, etc.) to their latest versions.

0.2.0.about_tab: Dedicated "About" tab in the user interface with project information.
0.2.0.manual_ntp_sync: Manual NTP synchronization button for immediate time correction.
0.2.0.unsaved_indicator: Visual indicator for unsaved settings (color change and asterisk).
0.2.0.app_logo: Official application logo in the "About" section and updated system icons.
0.2.0.monospace_font: Switched to a high-quality monospace font stack (Ubuntu Mono, JetBrains Mono).
0.2.0.full_width_tabs: Expanded tab buttons to full width for a more balanced layout.
0.2.0.grace_window_default: Reduced default late-start grace window from 5 minutes to 1 minute.
0.2.0.scheduler_loop_freq: Optimized internal scheduler loop frequency to 1 second.
0.2.0.text_selection_disabled: Disabled text selection and browser context menu for a native desktop feel.
0.2.0.ui_status_sync: Improved UI status synchronization after saving settings.
0.2.0.rust_clippy_warnings: Resolved numerous Rust clippy warnings and formatting issues.

0.1.0.daily_scheduler: Daily scheduler with NTP time correction and configurable late-start grace window.
0.1.0.audio_presets_initial: Five audio presets: Voice+Silence+Bell, Voice+Anthem, Voice+Metronome, Voice+Metronome+Anthem, Metronome-only.
0.1.0.system_tray: System Tray icon with context menu (Open, Skip Tomorrow, Quit).
0.1.0.persistent_settings: Persistent JSON settings stored in the platform config directory.
0.1.0.linux_media_pause: Linux media pause/resume via `xdotool` fallback (MPRIS D-Bus planned).
0.1.0.structured_logging: Structured logging with log rotation via `tauri-plugin-log`.
0.1.0.ci_cd_pipeline: CI/CD pipeline on GitHub Actions (lint, test, build for Windows + Linux).
0.1.0.conventional_commits: Conventional Commits enforcement documented in CONTRIBUTING.md.
0.1.0.audio_not_implemented_note: Audio playback engine is **not yet implemented**; the scheduler fires events and the overlay appears, but no sound is produced in this release.
